name: Cola-Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pat dry chicken. Salt and pepper to taste.
2. Place chicken in crockpot and onions on top.
3. Add cola and catsup.
4. Cook on LOW for 6 to 8 hours.
5. When cooked, remove from crockpot and let cool in refrigerator.
6. Skim off any fat that rises to the surface.
7. Reheat before serving.
